title: The Worst Textures
description: This is one of our first textures and one of our worst texturers
body:
This texture pack is made just for fun and this is my first time making and publishing a texture pack. 

THIS WAS MADE IN PAINT 

![This is bad ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0127b35c4ed1bd71f1f3e431e51dcc602bd5a681_0.webp)

Prepare your eyes for a truly minimalist Minecraft experience with the 'Simplicity Squared' pack! We've taken the standard 16x textures and generously blown them up to a whopping 128x... because why have detail when you can have big pixels? Marvel at the artistically challenged blocks, each one a bold statement in low-resolution abstraction. If you've ever thought Minecraft textures were too intricate, or if you simply enjoy the aesthetic of a slightly blurry JPEG, then 'Simplicity Squared' is the avant-garde masterpiece you never knew you needed. Warning: May induce nostalgia for early 2000s video games or a sudden urge to squint
